scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build --workspace=backend && npm run build --workspace=extension
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:shared && npm run typecheck --workspace=backend && npm run typecheck --workspace=extension
scripts.test: npm run build:shared && npm test --workspace=backend && npm test --workspace=extension
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n BACKEND,EXT -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:extension"
scripts.build:dev: npm run build:shared && vite build --mode development
